description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized SUV with a streamlined, aerodynamic body and a prominent front grille featuring a chrome accent. The vehicle has four passenger doors and a rear hatch, with tinted windows and a gently sloping roofline that enhances its sporty appearance. The wheels are multi-spoke alloys, and the side mirrors are integrated with the body, providing a sleek profile. The headlights are narrow and angular, while the taillights wrap around the rear corners for increased visibility. The exterior is finished in a light silver or white color, with black trim along the lower body and around the windows. The overall design suggests a comfortable, urban-friendly vehicle suitable for families or individuals seeking versatility and style.
description: A sleek, modern silver SUV with four doors, alloy wheels, and a streamlined, sporty design. Features include tinted windows, chrome accents, and black trim.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wide grille with chrome accents, narrow headlights, and a sculpted hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four doors, alloy wheels, and black lower trim, with a clear view of the roofline and side mirrors.
description_view_2: Rear view displays wraparound taillights, a rear hatch, and a subtle roof spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the doors, wheels, and overall body shape.
attribute_wheel_design: ten-spoke alloy wheels with a split-spoke pattern and metallic finish
